_comment: 转换脚本（会话内 Claude 设计，待用户审阅后再出图）。配音统一 narrator。原文两句→朗读拆 p1/p2 两拍，画面一女一男(随机)。纯文化，无营销。shots.content=英文(传模型)，contentZh=中文参考(不传模型)，model=显式声明的出图模型(gen-image 强制校验)。
sourceQuote: 假舆马者，非利足也，而致千里；假舟楫者，非能水也，而绝江河。

beats.action: girl in ancient robe holding a scroll, reciting the first line

shots.content: A present-day chubby little girl with two pigtails, a MODERN child dressed up in a pale-blue hanfu robe (NOT her usual pink dress, NOT an ancient person, NOT ancient times), standing and holding an open book in both hands, reciting a classic aloud, solemn and sweet. Background designed for a reading scene but kept MINIMAL: just ONE low wooden desk beside her with a rolled paper scroll and a writing brush on it, drawn as a few loose light pencil lines, no other furniture — everything sits on a clean solid PURE WHITE background with lots of empty white space, far simpler than the girl.
shots.contentZh: 当代胖女孩（双马尾，套穿淡蓝汉服，不是粉裙/不是古人/不是古代），站着双手捧翻开的书朗声诵读经典，庄重可爱。为诵读场景设计但极简的背景：身旁只有一张矮木桌，上面一卷纸卷和一支毛笔，几笔很淡的铅笔线，没有别的家具——一切都在纯白底上，大量白色留白，远比人物简单。

captions.zh: 假舆马者，非利足也，而致千里；
captions.pinyin: jiǎ yú mǎ zhě, fēi lì zú yě, ér zhì qiān lǐ;
captions.local: Người mượn xe ngựa, chẳng phải chân khỏe, mà đi được ngàn dặm;

lines.vi: Người mượn xe ngựa, chẳng phải chân khỏe,

beats.action: boy in ancient robe holding a scroll, reciting the second line

shots.content: A present-day chubby little boy with short golden-brown hair, a MODERN child dressed up in a pale-green hanfu robe (NOT his usual t-shirt and shorts, NOT an ancient person, NOT ancient times), standing and holding an open book in both hands, reciting a classic aloud, solemn and earnest. Background designed for a reading scene but kept MINIMAL: just ONE low wooden desk beside him with a rolled paper scroll and a writing brush on it, drawn as a few loose light pencil lines, no other furniture — everything sits on a clean solid PURE WHITE background with lots of empty white space, far simpler than the boy.
shots.contentZh: 当代胖男孩（金棕短发，套穿淡绿汉服，不是短袖短裤/不是古人/不是古代），站着双手捧翻开的书朗声诵读经典，庄重认真。为诵读场景设计但极简的背景：身旁只有一张矮木桌，上面一卷纸卷和一支毛笔，几笔很淡的铅笔线，没有别的家具——一切都在纯白底上，大量白色留白，远比人物简单。

captions.zh: 假舟楫者，非能水也，而绝江河。
captions.pinyin: jiǎ zhōu jí zhě, fēi néng shuǐ yě, ér jué jiāng hé.
captions.local: Người mượn thuyền bè, chẳng biết bơi, mà vượt được sông lớn.

lines.vi: Người mượn thuyền bè, chẳng biết bơi,

beats.action: a horse-drawn carriage traveling far down a long road; no people focus

shots.content: A brown HORSE harnessed at the FRONT, clearly PULLING a small wooden carriage behind it (a proper horse-drawn carriage: horse in front, cart behind, connected by shafts), traveling together along a long winding dirt road that stretches far toward distant rolling hills; the horse and carriage are small and far away; on a clean solid PURE WHITE background, only a few loose pencil lines for the road and hills, soft light. The horse MUST be present and pulling the carriage.
shots.contentZh: 一匹棕色的马套着挽具走在前面，拉着后面一辆小木车（正经的马车：马在前、车在后，用车辕连着），沿蜿蜒长路一起驶向远处起伏的山峦；马和车又小又远；大片留白暖纸，几笔松散铅笔线勾路和山，柔光。必须有马、且在拉车。

captions.zh: 借助车马的人，脚力再普通，也能日行千里。
captions.pinyin: jièzhù chē mǎ de rén, jiǎo lì zài pǔtōng, yě néng rì xíng qiān lǐ.
captions.local: Nhờ xe ngựa, dù sức thường, vẫn đi ngàn dặm mỗi ngày.

lines.zh: 借助车马的人，脚力再普通，
lines.vi: Nhờ xe ngựa, dù sức thường,
vẫn đi ngàn dặm mỗi ngày.

beats.action: a small boat crossing a wide river; no people focus

shots.content: A simple little wooden boat gliding across a wide calm river toward the far bank, conveying an easy crossing of deep water; NO main character, tiny and far; on a clean solid PURE WHITE background with only a few loose pencil lines for the water ripples and far shore, soft light.
shots.contentZh: 一只简单的小木船滑过宽阔平静的江面驶向对岸，表现轻松渡过深水；没有主角，又小又远；大片留白暖纸，只有几笔松散铅笔线勾出水波和远岸，柔光。

captions.zh: 借助船只的人，即使不会游泳，也能渡过大江。
captions.pinyin: jièzhù chuán zhī de rén, jíshǐ bù huì yóuyǒng, yě néng dùguò dà jiāng.
captions.local: Nhờ con thuyền, dù không biết bơi, vẫn qua được sông sâu.

lines.zh: 借助船只的人，即使不会游泳，
lines.vi: Nhờ con thuyền, dù không biết bơi,

beats.action: girl in her normal dress, a hand near her chin, eyes lighting up as she understands

shots.content: A present-day chubby little girl with two pigtails in her pink dress, standing with one little hand near her chin, eyes lighting up in a happy aha realization, adorable. Background: a clean solid PURE WHITE background with lots of empty white space, nothing else — far simpler than the girl.
shots.contentZh: 当代胖女孩（双马尾、粉裙），站着一只小手放下巴边、眼睛一亮恍然大悟，可爱。背景：纯白底、大量白色留白，别无他物——远比人物简单。

captions.zh: 真正厉害的，不是天生本领大，而是懂得借助外物。
captions.pinyin: zhēnzhèng lìhai de, bù shì tiānshēng běnlǐng dà, ér shì dǒngde jièzhù wàiwù.
captions.local: Người giỏi thật sự không phải sinh ra đã hơn người, mà là biết mượn sức bên ngoài.

lines.zh: 真正厉害的，不是天生本领大，
lines.vi: Người giỏi thật sự không phải sinh ra đã hơn người,
mà là biết mượn sức bên ngoài.

beats.action: girl and boy in ancient robes standing together, smiling with understanding

shots.content: The chubby little girl with two pigtails in a pale-blue ancient hanfu robe and the chubby little boy with short golden-brown hair in a pale-green ancient hanfu robe standing together, both smiling warmly with a look of gentle understanding; a very minimal study scene, only a few loose pencil lines, mostly bare warm paper, soft light.
shots.contentZh: 扎羊角辫的胖女孩穿淡蓝古装、金棕短发的胖男孩穿淡绿古装，两人并肩站着，都带着领悟后的温暖微笑，温柔可爱；极简书房，几笔松散铅笔线，大片留白暖纸，柔光。

captions.zh: 这，就是古人说的「善假于物」的智慧。
captions.pinyin: zhè, jiù shì gǔrén shuō de shàn jiǎ yú wù de zhìhuì.
captions.local: Đây chính là trí tuệ người xưa gọi là 'khéo mượn ngoại vật'.

lines.zh: 这，就是古人说的「善假于物」的智慧。
lines.vi: Đây chính là trí tuệ người xưa gọi là “khéo mượn ngoại vật”.
